prestazioni: Volvo P8 AWD (B4204T48) 3.0L twin-charged inline-6 hybrid powertrain: Full hybrid system recalibration via Polestar Performance Software (PPS) v2.0 with custom ECU flash by Dyno Dynamics Sweden, targeting 550 hp (410 kW) and 750 Nm (553 lb-ft) while retaining OEM torque vectoring and AWD dynamics. Includes upgraded hybrid battery cooling via PWR Performance intercooler core and custom heat exchanger setup for sustained high-load operation.

Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and TiAL Sport MV-R 44mm wastegate, paired with custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Armytrix with 200-cell catalytic converters for emissions compliance. Boost pressure set to 24 psi (1.65 bar) with custom turbo speed sensor integration via Motec M150 ECU for real-time monitoring.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 30-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom spring rates (8K front, 10K rear), and Polestar-specific top mounts by AST Suspension. Includes front sway bar upgrade to 28mm hollow-core by H&R and rear subframe reinforcement via custom aluminum strut brace by Cusco Japan for reduced chassis flex under high-G cornering.
estetica: Rocket Bunny Pandem Polestar 3 widebody kit (Type 2) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, including custom 3D-printed ABS wheel arches for aggressive tire clearance (285/30R22 front, 305/25R22 rear). Painted in PPG 'Liquid Silver' with matte black accents and custom vinyl overlay by Avery Dennison for heat dissipation.

Volk Racing TE37V MAG in 22x10.5J +30 offset (front) and 22x12J +25 offset (rear) with custom titanium wheel bolts by Bimecc, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30R22 front, 305/25R22 rear). Includes custom forged aluminum center caps by Work Wheels with Polestar logo engraving.

Custom carbon fiber engine cover by Seibon with integrated LED lighting by Diode Dynamics, paired with a full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovic (4.5-inch outlets) with carbon fiber tips and active sound tuning via Polestar's Android Automotive OS. Includes a custom front grille insert by 3D Carbon with laser-etched Polestar emblem and active cooling vents.
